research_index_definition.index_name: 中证半导体材料设备主题指数
research_index_definition.sample_scope: 40 securities whose businesses involve semiconductor materials or semiconductor equipment

etf_tracking_index.index_name: 中华交易服务半导体芯片行业指数
etf_tracking_index.sample_scope: 50 semiconductor-chip companies spanning materials, equipment, design, manufacturing, packaging and testing

limitations: The ETF tracks a broader semiconductor-chip index rather than the research index.
A point-in-time constituent-level overlap dataset was not available, so component_overlap_pct remains null.
The proxy adds design, manufacturing, packaging and testing exposure that is outside the research index's materials-and-equipment focus.
Semantic quality remains acceptable and is not promoted to strong.
